- **124** ‚Äî Derive phase state from ticket files, don't cache it (done, epic: ‚Äî)

  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/124-derive-phase-state`
- **124b** ‚Äî Add verify phase ‚Äî done means done (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Split the overloaded `done` phase into `verify` (run evidence gates) and `done` (ticket closed). Prevents agents from skipping /verify + /audit by jumping straight to done.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/124b-verify-phase-gate`
- **125** ‚Äî TDD step detection fragility and quality review bypass (done, epic: ‚Äî)

  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/125-tdd-step-fragility`
- **126** ‚Äî Prompt Hook Reminder for Research Validation (done, epic: ‚Äî)

- **130** ‚Äî Improve learnings discoverability for Claude Code agents (done, epic: ‚Äî)

  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/130-learnings-discoverability`

- **140** ‚Äî Fix 3 pre-existing TypeScript errors blocking clean tsc baseline (done, epic: ‚Äî)

  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/140-fix-pre-existing-typecheck-errors`
- **141** ‚Äî File upstream Claude Code bug: parallel-worktree creation flips parent core.bare=true (cancelled, epic: ‚Äî)
  Get Anthropic to fix a race in Claude Code's worktree creation that breaks git ops across all sibling worktrees.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/141-claude-code-worktree-bare-race`
- **142** ‚Äî End-to-end integration test for `install` / `upgrade` against a temp project (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Add a CI-runnable integration test that exercises `safeword install` and `safeword upgrade` against a temp project directory, asserting the user-visible result. Catch the class of bug where unit-tested pieces (templates, reconcile) compose into broken output.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/142-install-upgrade-integration-test`
- **143** ‚Äî Stop-hook binary terminal: CONFIDENT or BLOCKED (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Replace the Stop-hook quality-review prompt with a universal CONFIDENT/BLOCKED binary terminal so the agent commits to a verdict instead of dumping uncertainty lists on the user.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/143-stop-hook-binary-terminal`
- **144** ‚Äî Safeword cursor-parity enforcement (manifest + pre-commit + slash command) (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Stop folklore-driven Cursor parity. Replace it with an explicit manifest of pairs and contracts, enforced at commit-time (pre-commit hook) and on-demand (project-local slash command). Both gates live in safeword's repo only and never reach customers.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/144-audit-cursor-parity-check`
- **145** ‚Äî Schema `createIfMissing: false` is silently ignored by executor (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Make `executeTextPatch` honor the `createIfMissing: false` flag on `TextPatchDefinition`, or remove the flag and update the schema comment to match actual behavior. Pick whichever direction reflects the intended product behavior.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/145-claudemd-createifmissing-drift`
- **146** ‚Äî /verify output shape: status / decisions / next-actions separation (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Restructure the `/verify` skill's report so it cleanly separates status facts, user-decision questions, and agent next-actions. Eliminate the dump-style "everything in one verdict" pattern.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/146-verify-output-shape`
- **147** ‚Äî Skill-invocation phase-gate infrastructure (v1: /verify + /audit at done) (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Build a general phase-gate infrastructure so that when a ticket enters a gated phase, the agent must have invoked the required skills in the current session. v1 enforces /verify and /audit at the done phase; future gates added by config.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/147-verify-audit-forcing-function`
- **147** ‚Äî Worktree-clean dev loop: import ESLint presets from source (completed, epic: ‚Äî)
  Make a fresh git worktree commit-able after one `bun install` ‚Äî no pre-build step, no `--no-verify`.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/147-worktree-clean-dev-loop`
- **149** ‚Äî Derive safeword-managed path list from SAFEWORD_SCHEMA at build time (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Replace the hardcoded `safewordPaths` array in `session-auto-upgrade.ts` with a build-time-derived list sourced from `SAFEWORD_SCHEMA.ownedFiles`, so it can't drift from the schema's source of truth.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/149-safeword-paths-from-schema`
- **150** ‚Äî Revisit "Claude-only" Skill Classification (pending, epic: ‚Äî)
  Decide whether the `CLAUDE_ONLY_SKILLS` set (`brainstorm`, `tdd-review`, `elicit`) reflects a principled boundary or historical under-investment in Cursor parity. If principled, document the rule. If historical, add Cursor rules for the affected skills.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/150-claude-only-skill-classification`
- **151** ‚Äî PreToolUse hook: reset core.bare before git commands (open, epic: ‚Äî)
  Defend ad-hoc git ops (status, mv, push) from Claude Code's parallel-worktree `core.bare = true` race, not just `git commit`.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/151-pre-tool-git-bare-fix`
- **154** ‚Äî Task: Strip dead `version` field from .safeword/config.json (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Remove a write-once / never-read `version` field from `.safeword/config.json` that has caused a reasoning-LLM to flag projects as "stale" (real incident in `arcade-deep-research`, v0.25.14 ‚Üí v0.32.1 upgrade). Plaintext `.safeword/version` is the live source of truth; the JSON field is vestigial state.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/154-strip-dead-version-from-config`
- **156** ‚Äî Vendored-ignores export + install-time guidance + hygiene pass (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Give downstream safeword users a one-line escape hatch from "my strict ESLint config flags 84 errors inside `.safeword/**`," and harden the three actual code smells in vendored hooks while we're in there.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/156-vendored-ignores-export`
- **157** ‚Äî Install-time auto-patch of consumer's ESLint config (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Make the 156 print-nudge moot for the common case. Most users won't read printed instructions and many don't know what ESLint is ‚Äî so safeword should just add the line itself, with a backup, and tell the user it did. Print-nudge becomes the fallback for legacy configs and unrecognized patterns rather than the primary experience.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/157-install-time-auto-patch`
- **158** ‚Äî Crockford Base32 ticket IDs, folder-name-equals-ID (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Eliminate ticket-ID collisions between parallel sessions AND across git branches by minting uncoordinated 6-char Crockford Base32 IDs and making the folder name the ID alone, so any ID collision becomes a real git merge conflict instead of silent corruption.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/158-crockford-ticket-ids`
- **163** ‚Äî Fix `@vitest/eslint-plugin` missing-package failures in eslint-config tests (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Three test files in the eslint-configs area fail because `@vitest/eslint-plugin` isn't installed despite being declared in package.json. Get them green.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/163-vitest-eslint-plugin-missing`
- **164** ‚Äî Fix broken strip-version migration in safeword upgrade (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Main's ticket 154 implementation didn't actually strip the `version` field ‚Äî the test added to verify it fails on `origin/main`. Make it work.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/164-upgrade-strip-version-broken`
- **165** ‚Äî Add pretest rebuild guard against stale dist/cli.js (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Always rebuild before tests so `runCli`-based tests can't silently pass/fail against a stale binary.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/165-pretest-rebuild-guard`
- **4N5Y28** ‚Äî Replace novelResearchReminder boolean with monotonic per-file arrays (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Replace the mutable `novelResearchReminder?: boolean` in `QualityState` with two append-only string arrays (`learningsNudgesPending`, `learningsNudgesAcknowledged`) so the novel-claim nudge has per-file fingerprints, monotonic state transitions, and the disqualification message can name which files triggered.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/4N5Y28`
- **645W8H** ‚Äî session-reentry-brief (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Make worktree re-entry fast ‚Äî when a user returns to a Claude Code worktree after hours/days away, they should know "what was happening" and "what to do next" in under 10 seconds, without reading more than one or two lines.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/645W8H`
- **65TVGM** ‚Äî Add mechanical-multi-file calibration example (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Add one calibration example to SAFEWORD.md's sizing-rule section that closes the apparent contradiction between "3+ files ‚Üí feature" and the BDD skill's "Do NOT use for bug fixes / small isolated changes."
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/65TVGM`
- **8CMXNG** ‚Äî Per-pattern dedup for recentFailures (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Bound `state.recentFailures` by distinct pattern count via per-pattern dedup with timestamp refresh, so the array can't grow unboundedly on repeated firings of the same pattern.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/8CMXNG`
- **CXXB3P** ‚Äî ticket-folder-legibility (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Make ticket folders self-describing on disk so `ls` tells you what each ticket is about without opening `ticket.md`.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/CXXB3P-ticket-folder-legibility`
- **E79QAC** ‚Äî Rephrase novel-claim block to prevent misreading (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Rephrase the novel-claim disqualification message in `quality.ts:108` so it accurately describes the gate (flag-shown-to-user check) instead of the misleading "/quality-review first" phrasing.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/E79QAC`
- **J7VBGJ** ‚Äî TDD ledger: SHA-or-skip on RED/GREEN/REFACTOR checkboxes (incl. cross-scenario refactor) (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Close the silent-skip gap in safeword's TDD enforcement by anchoring every per-scenario TDD step (and the feature-level cross-scenario refactor pass) to either a real git commit SHA or a deliberate `skip: <reason>` line. Done gate verifies the anchors.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/J7VBGJ`
- **MKVNFB** ‚Äî Skip-with-reason for the dimensions.md gate (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Give the dimensions phase a deliberate escape valve ‚Äî `skip: <reason>` as the entire file content ‚Äî instead of forcing agents to produce a real dimensions.md when they have one obvious behavioral dimension and no real partitioning to do.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/MKVNFB`
- **XV72DT** ‚Äî Warn when learning files contain verification stamps (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Prevent agents from fabricating "‚úÖ Verified" claims that land in `.safeword-project/learnings/` and poison future-session context.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/XV72DT`
- **ZM32AK** ‚Äî Clear pre-existing lint debt (done, epic: ‚Äî)
  Drive `bun run lint` to zero errors so verify-gate Lint check goes green, with no behavior changes.
  ‚Üí `.safeword-project/tickets/completed/ZM32AK`
